title: Ambigous documentation in podman-systemd.unit.5.md
body:
In [podman-systemd.unit.5.md docmentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/398594ea5f3b508aa73008e7240595d69b18a13a/docs/source/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.md), there seems to be contradicting information.

Below, the document implies that we should use names like `other.service` instead of `other.container` to specify dependency.

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/398594ea5f3b508aa73008e7240595d69b18a13a/docs/source/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.md?plain=1#L140-L143

In the below example, we are asked to use names like `other.container` and the generator will convert the name

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/398594ea5f3b508aa73008e7240595d69b18a13a/docs/source/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.md?plain=1#L261-L275
